fields.name: safeguardId
fields.label: Safeguard or Domain
fields.description: Enter a CIS safeguard id like 5.1, 8.3, or a domain name like Asset Management or Access Control.

fields.name: igLevel
fields.label: Implementation Group
fields.description: Filter the checklist to a specific CIS Implementation Group.

fields.name: export
fields.label: Export Format
fields.description: Choose the output format for the evidence checklist.

reportDir.label: Output Directory
reportDir.description: Optional directory where the generated CIS evidence checklist should be written.

quiet.label: Quiet output
quiet.description: Suppress progress output while generating the evidence checklist.
